title: COCO 2017
author: Microsoft
short_description: Large-scale benchmark for detection, segmentation, and captioning research.

title: ImageNet 1K
author: ImageNet Team
short_description: Canonical large-scale image classification dataset powering modern representation learning.

title: Cityscapes
author: Daimler AG + MPII
short_description: Fine-grained street-scene annotations for semantic understanding in autonomous driving.

title: LVIS v1
author: FAIR
short_description: Long-tail object categories designed to stress-test recognition of rare classes.

title: KITTI Vision Benchmark
author: KIT + TTI
short_description: Classic benchmark suite for 3D detection, optical flow, and autonomous driving perception.

title: Ego4D
author: Meta AI
short_description: Massive egocentric video collection for multimodal understanding and embodied AI.

title: CIFAR-10
author: MIT and NYU
short_description: A well-known image classification dataset, 10 classes, 32 x 32 pixel images.

title: PASCAL VOC 2012
author: University of Oxford
short_description: Classic benchmark for detection and segmentation with curated object categories.

title: Open Images V7
author: Google
short_description: Large-scale open benchmark with labels, boxes, masks, and relationships.

title: ADE20K
author: MIT CSAIL
short_description: Dense scene parsing benchmark for semantic segmentation research.

title: BDD100K
author: Berkeley AI Research
short_description: Diverse driving benchmark for detection, segmentation, tracking, and lanes.

title: nuScenes
author: Motional
short_description: Sensor-fusion benchmark for 3D perception in urban driving scenes.

title: Waymo Open Dataset
author: Waymo
short_description: Massive benchmark for 3D detection and tracking with LiDAR-camera data.

title: Mapillary Vistas
author: Mapillary
short_description: Fine-grained global street-scene segmentation dataset.

title: SUN RGB-D
author: Princeton + MIT + TUM
short_description: RGB-D indoor benchmark for object and scene-level perception.

title: NYU Depth V2
author: NYU
short_description: Foundational indoor RGB-D dataset for depth and semantic perception.

title: DAVIS 2017
author: ETH Zurich + University of Bern
short_description: Reference benchmark for video object segmentation evaluation.

title: YouTube-VIS 2021
author: YouTube-VIS Team
short_description: Large-scale video instance segmentation and temporal tracking benchmark.

title: Kinetics-700
author: DeepMind
short_description: Large-scale action recognition dataset for video understanding.

title: UCF101
author: University of Central Florida
short_description: Classic wild-video benchmark for human action classification.

title: VGGFace2
author: University of Oxford
short_description: Large face-recognition dataset with strong age/pose diversity.

title: LAION-400M
author: LAION
short_description: Web-scale image-text corpus for multimodal pretraining.
